name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 11 Dec 2018
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version: ","bold":true},{"text":"6.33"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Amazon AU"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Carrier mapping","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now specify which shipping carrier you used to send an Amazon order. This is set on the shipping rate table, much like eBay carrier mapping. A step by step guide is available in our†support hub."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Origin country","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This field has been added to the product field mapping, for product registration. Instructions can be found in our†support hub."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The below bug fixes have been released in version 6.33:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue preventing canned responses from being used when emailing a tax invoice from a sales order."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue when cloning a sales order didn?t duplicate discount information."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue when using the bulk pick function updated dimensions."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed tracking URLs for Direct Freight, Hunter Express, Seko Logistics, and TNT."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
